title: wolfhsm: rename WolfHsmError to Error
description:
## Why
Every RustCrypto crate exposes its error type as `crate::Error`, not `crate::FooCrateError`. The name `WolfHsmError` is redundant with the crate name and forces callers to write the crate name twice (e.g. `wolfhsm::WolfHsmError`). This is immediately jarring to anyone familiar with the RustCrypto ecosystem.

## What needs to be done
Rename the type from `WolfHsmError` to `Error` in `wolfhsm/src/error.rs` and update all use sites across the crate. Add a `pub use error::Error;` re-export at the crate root so callers can write `wolfhsm::Error`.

## Acceptance criteria
- `wolfhsm::Error` is the public name
- No `WolfHsmError` symbol is exported
- All internal use sites updated
